clauses.statement: Material clarification, scope split, waiver request, external side effect, and security boundary questions persist as typed, deduplicated, HEAD-bound decision artifacts with impact scope and optional Brainbase handoff reference.

test_refs.case: HDC-S-1 HDC-S-2 duplicate material questions reuse one typed pending artifact

clauses.statement: A waiting_for_human Run starts no further action and returns to running only after the matching pending decision for the same Story, Run, and HEAD is atomically resolved; the next orchestration consumes resume_from_node_id by executing the canonical Safe Action suffix from that stopped node.

test_refs.case: HDC-S-3 HDC-S-6 waiting Run resumes only after its typed decision is resolved
HDC-S-3 waiting Run is side-effect free until the human decision is answered
HDC-S-3 HDC-S-6 CLI resume answers a typed decision and continues the same Run

clauses.statement: Critical gate waiver requests are never resolved through the checkpoint; evidence, split, or block remains required and PR, review override, and merge authority are unchanged.

test_refs.case: HDC-S-4 critical gate waiver is rejected without resolving the artifact

clauses.statement: After restart, decision index and the Run human decision journal reconstruct the question, answer, actor, timestamp, and reflected artifacts; duplicate creation repairs a missing index entry, malformed decision JSON fails typed without overwrite, and duplicate answers, stale HEAD, cancelled Run, and invalid types fail closed.

test_refs.case: HDC-S-6 HDC-S-7 answer binds to Run and HEAD and records reflection targets

diagrams.rationale: Shows that untrusted decision input cannot mutate Run authority until type, size, identity, HEAD, pending state, and critical-waiver checks pass.
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Operator[Authenticated operator] --> CLI[execute resume]
  Untrusted[Untrusted decision input] --> Validation[Type size Run Story HEAD pending validation]
  CLI --> Validation
  Validation -->|reject| NoMutation[No Run mutation]
  Validation -->|accept| Decision[Atomic decision artifact]
  Decision --> Journal[Run journal]
  Journal --> Resume[Same Run resumes]
  Critical[Critical gate waiver] -->|always reject| NoMutation

diagrams.rationale: Shows that artifact persistence precedes waiting and validated resolution precedes resumption.
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  running --> waiting_for_human: persist typed decision
  waiting_for_human --> running: resolve same Run and HEAD
  waiting_for_human --> cancelled: operator cancel
  waiting_for_human --> waiting_for_human: invalid answer rejected
